name: Potential Role for Human Cytochrome P450 3A4 in Estradiol Homeostasis
snippet: These results suggest that CYP3A4 may play an important role in estradiol homeostasis. This may be of concern for treatment of pregnant and lactating women.

name: CYP3A4 drug metabolism considerations in pediatric
snippet: Cytochrome P450 3A4 (CYP3A4) is a crucial enzyme involved in the Phase I metabolism of numerous medications used in clinical practice.

name: The influence of female sex and estrogens on drug pharmacokinetics
snippet: This review highlights key sex differences in drug pharmacokinetics, focusing on absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion.

name: CYP3A4 and CYP3A5: the crucial roles in clinical drug
snippet: This article first reviews the role of CYP3A4/5 in drug metabolism in the human body, including inhibitors and inducers of CYP3A4/5 and drug-drug interactions. In terms of genetic polymorphism, it discusses the detection methods, enzymatic kinetic characteristics, and clinical guidelines for CYP3A5.
